items.title: Private Employment Rises By 183,000, Beats Estimates In January: 'Consumer-Facing Industries Drove Hiring'
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: Private employers added 183,000 jobs in January, surpassing expectations and December's upwardly revised 176,000. Service-providing industries gained 190,000 jobs, while goods-producing sectors lost 6,000, with manufacturing shedding 13,000.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Apple's stock was 2.4% lower in premarket trading, weighing on tech-heavy indices.
Alphabet's stock was 7.2% lower in premarket trading, weighing on tech-heavy indices.
